category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/yshavit/mdq says mdq aims to do for Markdown what jq does for JSON.
source_facts.description: Like jq but for Markdown
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title: mdq: jq for Markdown
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is a documentation surface and links tutorial/user-manual wiki pages.
Official GitHub wiki is referenced from the README for release-binary documentation and user docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/yshavit/mdq; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository topics include markdown, jq, md, and querying.
source_facts.description says Like jq but for Markdown
